RESPONDENT TO FILE DECLARATIONS BY 12/09; PETITIONER TO FILE RESPONSE BY 12/19; REFEREE'S RECOMMENDATIONS TO BE SUBMITTED BY 01/23/03; OBJECTIONS TO RECOMMENDATIONS DUE 01/28. RE CALPERS EVALUATIONS, DUE 12/09; PETITIONER'S RESPONSE DUE 12/19; REPLY DUE 01/09. (THE COURT ANNOUNCED A "TENTATIVE RULING" AT THE HEARING ON THE RECORD AT LENGTH.) Notice Of Petition And Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Nov-14-2002 Continued To Jan-30-03 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
PETITIONER SAN JOSE MERCURY NEWS Petition For Writ Of Mandate To Compel Release of Public Records:
APPEAR: Karl Olson, Esq. 433-4949 & Judy Alexander, Esq. 831/479-3490 for petitioner & moving party; Melanie Carver, Esq. 916/326-3549 for respondent & opposing party California Public Employees' Retirement System.
RULING: The Court continues the matter and sets a hearing re referee's recommendations re trade secrets for 01/30/03 at 3:30pm. Respondent to file declarations by 12/09; petitioner to file response by 12/19; referee's recommendations to be submitted by 01/23/03; objections to recommendations due 01/28. Re CalPERS evaluations, due 12/09; petitioner's response due 12/19; reply due 01/09. (The Court announced a "tentative ruling" at the hearing on the record at length.) (302/AJR/RS) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193

RESPONDENT CALIFORNIA PUBLIC EMPLOYEES' RETIREMENT SYSTEM MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE:
APPEAR: Karl Olson, Esq. 433-4949 & Judy Alexander, Esq. 831/479-3490 for petitioner & opposing party; Melanie Carver, Esq. 916/326-3549 for respondent & moving party.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling (MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE BY CALPERS DENIED. VENUE PROPER UNDER CCP 401(1). CCP 401(2) OR CCP CCP 393 NOT APPLICABLE. AGREEMENT BETWEEN CALPERS AND CALIFORNIA ENERGY VENTURES CONTAINING VENUE PROVISIONS NOT APPLICABLE BECAUSE PLAINTIFF MERCURY NEWS NOT PARTY). (302/AJR/RS) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193
